name: Command and Coordination
descriptionTemplate: After commanding a land unit to attack, there is a X% chance to grant "Coordination" to nearby allies and yourself for 1 turn. Units with "Coordination" gain +15% damage. Nullify the negative status when it is applied to the unit (unless triggered by morale diminish), then clear "Coordination."

progression.renderedDesc: After commanding a land unit to attack, there is a 20% chance to grant "Coordination" to nearby allies and yourself for 1 turn. Units with "Coordination" gain +15% damage. Nullify the negative status when it is applied to the unit (unless triggered by morale diminish), then clear "Coordination."
progression.renderedDescFr: After commanding a land unité to attaque, there is a 20% chance to grant "Coordination" to nearby allies and yourself pendant 1 tour. Unités with "Coordination" gain +15% dégâts. Nullify the negative status when it is applied to the unité (unless triggered by moral diminish), then clear "Coordination."

longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Commandement and Coordination » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « After commanding a land unité to attaque, there is a 100% chance to grant "Coordination" to nearby allies and yourself pendant 1 tour. Unités with "Coordination" gain +15% dégâts. Nullify the negative status when it is applied to the unité (unless triggered by moral diminish), then clear "Coordination." ». Compétence signature liée à une carte précise, à niveauer quand on investit dans ce général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Command and Coordination" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "After commanding a land unit to attack, there is a 100% chance to grant "Coordination" to nearby allies and yourself for 1 turn. Units with "Coordination" gain +15% damage. Nullify the negative status when it is applied to the unit (unless triggered by morale diminish), then clear "Coordination."". A signature tied to a specific card, worth levelling whenever you invest in that general.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Command and Coordination“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „After commanding a land unit to attack, there is a 100% chance to grant "Coordination" to nearby allies and yourself for 1 turn. Units with "Coordination" gain +15% damage. Nullify the negative status when it is applied to the unit (unless triggered by morale diminish), then clear "Coordination."“. Eine an eine bestimmte Karte gebundene Signatur, die beim Investieren geleveled werden sollte.
